name: Kyash API
description: Japanese wallet/card issuer Kyash — issuing APIs for virtual/physical Visa cards and P2P transfers.

seo.title: Kyash API — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Kyash API: Japanese wallet/card issuer Kyash — issuing APIs for virtual/physical Visa cards and P2P transfers.

when_to_use: Virtual Visa card issuing for Japanese fintech and loyalty reward products
P2P transfer and digital wallet API for Japanese consumer finance apps
Physical card programs with real-time spend notifications via Kyash SDK
Corporate expense prepaid card issuance for Japanese business apps

pros: Virtual and physical Visa card issuing in Japan
cons: Smaller program scale than Marqeta peers
review.verdict: Niche pick for Japanese fintechs needing Visa issuing and P2P — limited value outside Japan.
review.best_for: Japan-market fintechs launching wallet or issuing products
review.not_for: Non-Japan programs or merchants needing acquiring
